request: Show me a summary of orders by country, including customer contact details

sql_queries.title: Orders by Shipping Country
sql_queries.description: Total number of orders grouped by the shipping country
sql_queries.sql: SELECT ShipCountry, COUNT(OrderID) AS TotalOrders FROM Orders GROUP BY ShipCountry ORDER BY TotalOrders DESC;

sql_queries.title: Revenue by Shipping Country
sql_queries.description: Total revenue generated from orders, grouped by the shipping country
sql_queries.sql: SELECT o.ShipCountry, SUM(od.UnitPrice * od.Quantity * (1 - od.Discount)) AS TotalRevenue FROM Orders AS o JOIN "Order Details" AS od ON o.OrderID = od.OrderID GROUP BY o.ShipCountry ORDER BY TotalRevenue DESC;

sql_queries.title: Country Order Metrics
sql_queries.description: Summary of total orders and total revenue for each shipping country
sql_queries.sql: SELECT o.ShipCountry, COUNT(DISTINCT o.OrderID) AS TotalOrders, SUM(od.UnitPrice * od.Quantity * (1 - od.Discount)) AS TotalRevenue FROM Orders AS o JOIN "Order Details" AS od ON o.OrderID = od.OrderID GROUP BY o.ShipCountry ORDER BY TotalOrders DESC, TotalRevenue DESC;
